description: Dry-run redirect destination mapping for stale class landers. This config does not modify public output.

default_destination.destination_reason: No specific course hub mapping matched; route to home pending operator review.

targets.destination_reason: BLS/BLS Renewal/HeartCode BLS stale class landers should redirect to the BLS hub.
ACLS stale class landers should redirect to the ACLS hub.
PALS stale class landers should redirect to the PALS hub.
Heartsaver, First Aid, and CPR AED stale class landers should redirect to the Heartsaver hub.
ARC stale class landers should redirect to the ARC hub.
HSI stale class landers should redirect to the HSI hub.
USCG Elementary First Aid stale class landers should redirect to the USCG Elementary First Aid CPR hub.
